name: Increase Magnitude of High Rate Scans
notes: If a high rate flow-based scanning attack is detected, this rule increases the magnitude of the current event.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Classify
where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon
when the Event Payload contains High
TD_list: APPLY Increase Magnitude of High Rate Scans on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Classify
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon
AND when the Event Payload contains High
